lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or damage, and the interior is in like-new condition. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order with no issues.

You're going to love this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition and has been cared for nicely over the years. While you might find a few minor cosmetic marks from regular use, it drives great and is ready for many more miles. It's a solid, reliable choice for anyone looking for a quality car that's been treated right!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be reliable. The exterior shows heavy wear, including multiple large dents, significant paint fading, and visible rust on several body panels. Inside, the cabin has sustained heavy use with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional interior components. Mechanically, the car starts but suffers from a rough idle, a leaking exhaust system, and a suspension that needs immediate work. This is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be safely roadworthy. The exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, noticeable rust on the lower panels, and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly, the transmission shifts harshly, and there are fluid leaks that need immediate attention. This is a project car best suited for an experienced mechanic or someone looking for a parts vehicle.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and looks totally flawless inside and out. It drives like a dream and is ready for your next big adventure. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 B32 inline-six engine with its high-pressure VANOS system functioning at factory specifications. Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect. Full service records included.

Offered here is an absolute gem: a garage-kept masterpiece that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, preserved under a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, and the dashboard is free of any sun damage or scratches. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, with a documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been pampered since day one. If you demand perfection, this is your car.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in showroom condition. This vehicle reflects a standard of preservation rarely encountered on the secondary market, featuring a flawless aesthetic and a mechanically sound profile. Every detail has been meticulously curated to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity synonymous with showroom quality. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, offering the discerning collector an unparalleled driving experience. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this one go, but it’s time for a new home. This beauty is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—I’ve babied it from day one and it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new, you’ve found it! Drop me a message if you want to come take a look!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service records included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed, boasting a flawless deep-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and retains its original scent, completely free from any wear, creasing, or fading. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; all services are current with full documentation from the authorized dealership. The engine operates with whisper-quiet precision, and the car sits on pristine, curb-rash-free alloy wheels wrapped in near-new performance tires. Every feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist suite, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a pre-owned vehicle that is indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example. Every detail, from the flawless finish to the untouched interior, reflects an absolute commitment to excellence.

This exceptional vehicle serves as a benchmark for the model, preserved in immaculate condition. Every facet of its presentation—from the flawless paintwork to the pristine interior—reflects an uncompromising commitment to quality. For the discerning buyer seeking a specimen of peerless caliber, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m so excited to get this absolute gem into the hands of someone who will love it as much as I have. Honestly, it’s in incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it rolled off the lot yesterday! This car has been my pride and joy, kept super clean and always tucked away in the garage. You really won't find another one this pristine. Come take a look, I promise you're going to fall in love at first sight!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Full service records. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

Step into a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This car is in absolute showroom condition, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish on the exterior paint with zero swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally flawless; the premium leather remains supple and unmarked, and the cabin still retains that fresh, new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach—always garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and serviced ahead of schedule with a full binder of documentation included. Every button, dial, and feature functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a preserved masterpiece that satisfies even the most discerning collector's eye.

This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.
